title: Pipi Pupu
description: A mod that adds Pipi ore and more things
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mnucQ6JVd_E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- I DON'T HAVE THE MOD ANYMORE
- My windows broke so i lost the mod but if you guys want me to remake it i could.
- 100 downloads and i will remake it

This is a mod made by me to test what i can do in mcreator as a beginner. Have fun with it and tag me if you use it.

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Ionutprohero

Discord: ionutprohero_backup

Features
- Pipi Ore: Spawns below Y 40.
- Pipi Ingot: Smelted from Pipi Ore.
- Pipi Block: Decorative block.
- Tools and Armor:

Tools: Durable with 2000 durability, perfect for long usage without needing mending.

Armor: Very strong and can protect you from almost anything.

Notes:

The recipes follow the same patterns as vanilla Minecraft.

Compatibility
- Minecraft Version: 1.20.1-1.12.2 Forge
- No dependencies required.
